---
title: "{{ cookiecutter.project_name }} - Lab Notebook"
author: "{{ cookiecutter.author_name }}"
date: now
format:
  typst:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

## Project Initialization

**Date:** `r Sys.Date()` (or current execution date)  
**Data Provenance:** Document where the raw data came from.

### Objective
Provide a brief summary of the analytical goals for this notebook run.

### Notes & Observations
* Snakemake workflow initialised.

```{bash}
#| eval: false

# some code

```

* Symlinks verified against scratch space.
